name: idea-scout
description: Generate sellable software ideas grounded in real web evidence, then loop each through the idea-incubation-review gate until 5 pass READY. Fans out four generation analysts (trend, demand, whitespace, monetization) that cite sources, dedupes against a persistent ledger of every idea ever proposed, and auto-refines a REFINE candidate once. Every proposed idea carries source URLs for why it was picked. Optional CurrentsAPI news MCP (set up via /init-mcp) grounds what's selling today; falls back to WebSearch. Requires the idea-incubation-review plugin installed. Use when you want fresh, market-validated software ideas rather than judging one idea you already have.
